meaning: vt.断然地说,确告,保证,担保
examples: She's perfectly safe, I can assure you.
Victory would assure a place in the finals.
Victory would assure them a place in the finals.
The UltraViolet logo on the packaging of the device would assure the customer, it is compliant.
"Most of them don't think they can sing, but they can, I assure you, " he said.
